name: Chicken or Pork Adobo
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Chicken thighs or pork butt
recipeInstructions:
1. If using pork, cut the pork into 1 1/2-inch pieces.
2. In a large saucepan, combine all ingredients.
3. Cover and let stand for 1 to 3 hours.
4. Bring to a boil over medium heat. Lower the heat and simmer for 30 minutes (45 minutes for pork).
5. Uncover and continue simmering for an additional 15 minutes or until the liquid evaporates and the chicken or pork is lightly browned.
6. Makes 6 servings.
